reasons: Acceptance criteria satisfied: single execution model verified by invokeStage test and runPipeline returning executionModel=spawn-sync-explicit.
Acceptance criteria satisfied: deterministic stage invocation order verified by runPipeline deterministic-order test.
Acceptance criteria satisfied: fail-fast behavior verified by runPipeline fail-fast test (stops before later stage and reports failedStageId/stoppedAt).
Acceptance criteria satisfied: no implicit behavior and explicit inputs/outputs validated by CLI success test and pipeline-context path resolution tests.
summary: Validated work_1_runner_and_execution_contract with the project test suite. All 7 tests passed, including CLI argument enforcement, CLI default stage execution, deterministic context/path resolution, deterministic stage order, single execution model usage, and fail-fast stopping behavior.
